source: Hand-authored + verified by James in PowerPoint, 2026-06-25 (AnimLibrary_Timeline_ToAnimate). Extracted from the real animation pane.
_notes: All steps play After Previous (back-to-back). Header roles are intentionally NOT animated (present from slide start). Each milestone repeats `block`; `{u}` = 1-based unit index. Direction tokens: center = horizontal stretch from center; axisV = vertical stretch growing from the axis side (bottom for above-axis units, top for below); outV = wipe revealing away from the axis (down for above, up for below).
